This command will:
1. `find` - search through the directory tree
2. `/Users/stream/codes/llm/ganglia/ganglia-example` - starting from your current directory
3. `-name "*.md"` - look for files ending with .md
4. `-type f` - only count regular files (not directories)
5. `| wc -l` - count the number of lines (files) found
